scientific_scope: This is a Phase 1 A2d Riemannian comparator implementation smoke only.
The smoke checks scalp covariance extraction, training-only log-Euclidean reference fitting, tangent projection, fold split discipline, logits, metrics and artifact writing.
The backend is an internal NumPy log-Euclidean/tangent smoke proxy, not the final pyRiemann or final A2d comparator package.
No held-out outer-test subject may participate in reference, alignment, classifier, calibration, threshold or tuned QC fitting.
No headline claim is permitted from this smoke output.
